problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: If Acoustic levitation for contactless manipulation is applied to ionic, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
